third_project_attempts.thefuck: 0 hard negatives; generated candidates were correct-like
third_project_attempts.luigi: candidate construction failed under exact edit-plan interface
third_project_attempts.youtube-dl_exact_edit: candidate construction failed under exact edit-plan interface
third_project_attempts.youtube-dl_full_file: 0 hard negatives; generated candidates were correct-like

supported_claims: The current source-acquisition protocol can produce a real visible-pass/hidden-fail opportunity set, but only across PySnooper and cookiecutter.
Third-project acquisition failed for distinct reasons: visible-failing wrong patches, correct-like generated patches, and edit materialization instability.
Changing the generation interface from exact edit-plan to full-file replacement fixed candidate materialization for youtube-dl but did not produce hard negatives.
The fresh realistic branch should be reported as a gate-controlled negative/source-acquisition result unless a new pre-registered source protocol is started.
unsupported_claims: The fresh realistic branch is ready for Qwen or DeepSeek verifier API evaluation.
The current data supports a three-project realistic hard-negative verifier experiment.
More API calls under the same targets are likely to produce a scientifically clean opportunity set.
The generation-interface repair validates the verifier system.

paper_integration.primary_sqj_route: Keep the existing evidence-visibility SQJ framing as the main route unless a larger fresh realistic cohort is built.
fresh_realistic_branch_role: Supplementary negative result on hard-negative gate construction
Motivation for reporting generator success/failure and gate readiness separately from verifier metrics
paper_integration.recommended_wording: Our fresh realistic agent-patch source acquisition produced 26 validated visible-pass/hidden-fail cases across two projects, but repeated third-project attempts either produced correct-like patches, visible-failing wrong patches, or failed candidate materialization. We therefore treat this branch as a source-acquisition and gate-readiness result rather than a verifier-ready main experiment.

next_action.shortest_clean_path: Freeze this branch as a two-project supplement/negative result and update the paper plan accordingly.
next_action.optional_longer_path: Start a separate, pre-registered source-acquisition protocol with different target tasks before any further API calls.
next_action.forbidden_next_action: Do not run Qwen/DeepSeek verifier APIs on this branch while ready_for_verifier_api is false.
